---
title: "2025-6 Mouse surveys"
subtitle: "CSIRO / GRDC / NSW DPIRD"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: cosmo
    fontcolor: black
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: source
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| include: false

## load packages - this doc needs to be standalone from targets pipeline
library(targets)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(flextable)
library(patchwork)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggh4x)

## load targets (handle both pipeline and standalone rendering)
store_path <- if (dir.exists("_targets")) "_targets" else "../../_targets"
targets::tar_load(c(data, aus_shp, aez_adj), store = store_path)

# Attach ae_zone to each dataset via spatial extraction
attach_aez <- function(df, aez) {
  df_vect <- terra::vect(sf::st_as_sf(df, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = "epsg:4326"))
  x <- terra::extract(terra::vect(aez), df_vect)
  df$ae_zone <- as.factor(ifelse(is.na(x$ae_zone), "NSW N Qld S", x$ae_zone))
  df
}

# flextable defaults
set_flextable_defaults(
  digits = 2,
  font.size = 10,
  na_str = "\u2014",
  theme_fun = theme_vanilla,
  padding = 6,
  background.color = "#EFEFEF")

# ---------- Calculate mice_prop for each data type ----------

## Traps: proportion of traps which caught a mouse
data_traps <- data$traps |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    # adjust cases when more mice than traps
    number_mice_caught = if_else(number_mice_caught > number_functional_traps, number_functional_traps, number_mice_caught),
    # calculate proportion
    mice_prop = pmin(1, pmax(0, number_mice_caught / number_functional_traps)),
    survey_method = "traps") |>
  # only show highest proportion per session
  group_by(region, site, subsite, session_start_date, session_end_date) |>
  slice_max(mice_prop, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  attach_aez(aez_adj)

## Burrows: proportion of transects with active burrows
data_burrows <- data$burrows |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    mice_prop = pmin(1, pmax(0, burrow_transects_present / burrow_transects_searched)),
    survey_method = "burrows") |>
  attach_aez(aez_adj)

## Chewcards: proportion chewed
data_chewcards <- data$chewcards |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    mice_prop = pmin(1, pmax(0, chewcards_chewed / chewcards_deployed)),
    survey_method = "chewcards") |>
  attach_aez(aez_adj)

# ---------- Detect current year and recent seasons ----------

current_year <- max(data_traps$year_adj, na.rm = TRUE)

# Get ordered season_year_adj levels that have data in any dataset
seasons_with_data <- union(
  union(
    as.character(unique(data_traps$season_year_adj)),
    as.character(unique(data_burrows$season_year_adj))
  ),
  as.character(unique(data_chewcards$season_year_adj))
)

all_levels <- levels(data_traps$season_year_adj)
seasons_ordered <- all_levels[all_levels %in% seasons_with_data]

# Most recent 2 seasons (for highlighting in plots)
recent_seasons <- tail(seasons_ordered, 2)
recent_season_label <- recent_seasons[length(recent_seasons)]

# Most recent season alias (used in table and interpretation)
latest <- recent_season_label

# Regional averages for traps (for trend plots)
data_traps_regional <- data_traps |>
  group_by(region, state, ae_zone, season, season_year_adj, year_adj) |>
  summarise(
    mice_prop = mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    session_start_date = min(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Regional averages for burrows and chewcards (for trend plots)
data_burrows_regional <- data_burrows |>
  group_by(region, state, ae_zone, season, season_year_adj, year_adj) |>
  summarise(
    mice_prop = mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    session_start_date = min(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

data_chewcards_regional <- data_chewcards |>
  group_by(region, state, ae_zone, season, season_year_adj, year_adj) |>
  summarise(
    mice_prop = mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    session_start_date = min(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```


## Introduction

This report summarises raw data the most recent house mouse survey results from the national monitoring network across Australian grain-growing regions. It is designed to help farmers, agronomists, and growers understand current mouse activity in their region and how it compares to previous years.

:::{.callout-tip}
## How are mice surveyed?

**Live traps** are set at benchmark sites overnight. *Trap success* is the proportion of traps that catch a mouse --- higher values mean more mice.

![Live traps set in the field and captured mice.](images/traps.png){width=80%}

**Rapid assessments** use two quick methods: *chew cards* (cards placed in paddocks that mice chew on) and *active burrow counts* (walking set transects and looking for burrows with fresh signs of mouse activity). For both, the result is presented as the proportion of cards chewed or transects with active burrows (averaged across sites for clean presentation).

![Active mouse burrows (top) and a chewed chew card (bottom).](images/rapid_assessment.png){width=40%}
:::


## Survey locations

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Live-Trap Sites

```{r}
#| label: map-traps

# Get most recent survey per site for popup info
trap_sites <- data_traps |>
  group_by(state, region, site, longitude, latitude) |>
  filter(session_start_date == max(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  summarise(
    last_survey = format(max(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE), "%d %b %Y"),
    last_trap_success = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  distinct()

leaflet(trap_sites, width = "100%") |>
  addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap", group = "Street") |>
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~longitude, lat = ~latitude,
    color = "red",
    fillColor = "red",
    fillOpacity = 0.8, radius = 7, stroke = TRUE, weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>", site, "</b><br>",
      "Region: ", region, "<br>",
      "State: ", state, "<br>",
      "Last survey: ", last_survey, "<br>",
      "Trap success: ", last_trap_success, "%"
    )
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Street", "Satellite"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))

```

### Rapid Assessment Sites

```{r}
#| label: map-rapid

# Combine burrow and chewcard sites
rapid_sites <- bind_rows(
  data_burrows |> mutate(method = "Burrows"),
  data_chewcards |> mutate(method = "Chewcards")
) |>
  group_by(state, region, site, longitude, latitude) |>
  summarise(
    methods_used = paste(sort(unique(method)), collapse = " & "),
    last_survey = format(max(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE), "%d %b %Y"),
    last_activity = round(
      mean(mice_prop[session_start_date == max(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)], na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  distinct()

leaflet(rapid_sites, width = "100%") |>
  addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap", group = "Street") |>
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~longitude, lat = ~latitude,
    color = "red",
    fillColor = "red",
    fillOpacity = 0.8, radius = 7, stroke = TRUE, weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>", site, "</b><br>",
      "Region: ", region, "<br>",
      "State: ", state, "<br>",
      "Methods: ", methods_used, "<br>",
      "Last survey: ", last_survey, "<br>",
      "Last activity: ", last_activity, "%"
    )
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Street", "Satellite"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))

```

:::


## Mouse Population Trends

### Live-Trap Results

```{r}
#| label: fig-traps-history
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 14
#| fig-cap: "Average trap success per region across all monitoring years. Values are averaged across all sites and subsites within each region."

data_traps_regional |>
  ggplot(aes(x = ymd(session_start_date), y = mice_prop)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_nested_wrap(vars(region), ncol = 1, axes = "all") +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Proportion trap success") +
  theme(strip.background = element_blank())

```

### Rapid Assessment Results

Burrow and chew card data are averaged within each region for clarity. Each coloured line represents a different region.

#### Active Burrow Counts

```{r}
#| label: fig-burrows-history
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 14
#| fig-cap: "Average burrow detection rates per agroecological zone across all monitoring years. Values are averaged across all sites within each zone."

data_burrows_regional |>
  group_by(ae_zone, season, season_year_adj, year_adj) |>
  summarise(
    mice_prop = mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    session_start_date = min(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = ymd(session_start_date), y = mice_prop)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ ae_zone, ncol = 2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion burrow detection") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )

```

#### Chew Cards

```{r}
#| label: fig-chewcards-history
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 14
#| fig-cap: "Average chew card detection rates per agroecological zone across all monitoring years. Values are averaged across all sites within each zone."

data_chewcards_regional |>
  group_by(ae_zone, season, season_year_adj, year_adj) |>
  summarise(
    mice_prop = mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    session_start_date = min(session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = ymd(session_start_date), y = mice_prop)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ ae_zone, ncol = 2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion chew card detection") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )

```


## Regional Summary

```{r}
#| label: tbl-summary
#| tbl-cap: "Regional summary for recent seasons. Colour gradients: white = no/low activity, yellow = moderate, red = high activity."

# Summaries for both recent seasons
summary_seasons <- recent_seasons

# Trap summary
tbl_trap <- data_traps |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% summary_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, ae_zone) |>
  summarise(trap_success_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

# Burrow summary
tbl_burrow <- data_burrows |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% summary_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, ae_zone) |>
  summarise(burrow_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

# Chewcard summary
tbl_chew <- data_chewcards |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% summary_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, ae_zone) |>
  summarise(chewcard_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

# Join all summaries
tbl_summary <- tbl_trap |>
  full_join(tbl_burrow, by = c("season_year_adj", "ae_zone")) |>
  full_join(tbl_chew, by = c("season_year_adj", "ae_zone")) |>
  arrange(season_year_adj, ae_zone) |>
  # Classify overall activity based on the maximum across available methods
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    max_activity = max(c_across(c(trap_success_pct, burrow_pct, chewcard_pct)), na.rm = TRUE),
    activity_level = case_when(
      is.infinite(max_activity) ~ "No data",
      max_activity >= 25 ~ "High",
      max_activity >= 5  ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE               ~ "Low"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-max_activity)

# Build colour scales for each metric
col_trap <- col_numeric(
  palette = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
  domain = c(0, max(tbl_summary$trap_success_pct, 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
  na.color = "#EFEFEF")

col_burrow <- col_numeric(
  palette = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
  domain = c(0, max(tbl_summary$burrow_pct, 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
  na.color = "#EFEFEF")

col_chew <- col_numeric(
  palette = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
  domain = c(0, max(tbl_summary$chewcard_pct, 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
  na.color = "#EFEFEF")

flextable(tbl_summary) |>
  merge_v(j = c("season_year_adj")) |>
  set_header_labels(
    season_year_adj = "Season",
    ae_zone = "Agroecological zone",
    trap_success_pct = "Trap success (%)",
    burrow_pct = "Burrow detection (%)",
    chewcard_pct = "Chew card detection (%)",
    activity_level = "Overall activity"
  ) |>
  bg(j = "trap_success_pct", bg = col_trap, source = "trap_success_pct") |>
  bg(j = "burrow_pct", bg = col_burrow, source = "burrow_pct") |>
  bg(j = "chewcard_pct", bg = col_chew, source = "chewcard_pct") |>
  # colour-code the activity level column
  bg(i = ~ activity_level == "High", j = "activity_level", bg = "#d73027") |>
  bg(i = ~ activity_level == "Moderate", j = "activity_level", bg = "#fee08b") |>
  bg(i = ~ activity_level == "Low", j = "activity_level", bg = "#b8e186") |>
  bg(i = ~ activity_level == "No data", j = "activity_level", bg = "#EFEFEF") |>
  align(align = "center", part = "all") |>
  autofit()

```

### Regional Summary Map

The map below shows the geographic distribution of mouse activity across regions for each of the last four seasons. The metrics shown on the map are summarised as follows:

- **Trap success (T)**: The average proportion of live traps that caught a mouse, calculated across all sites and trapping sessions within each region for that season. For example, T: 5.2% means that on average 5.2% of traps set in that region caught a mouse.
- **Burrow detection (B)**: The average proportion of walked transects that had active mouse burrows, averaged across all sites within the region for that season.
- **Chew card detection (C)**: The average proportion of deployed chew cards that showed signs of mouse gnawing, averaged across all sites within the region for that season.
- **Activity level**: Classified based on the highest value among the three metrics --- Low (below 5%), Moderate (5--25%), or High (above 25%).

```{r}
#| label: fig-summary-map
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 35
#| fig-cap: "Geographic overview of regional mouse activity. Point colour indicates overall activity level; labels show trap success (T), burrow detection (B), and chew card detection (C) where available."

# Define seasons for the map: Summer-2025 through the 2 most recent
map_seasons <- unique(c("Summer-2025", "Autumn-2025", "Winter-2025", recent_seasons))
# keep only seasons that exist in the data and maintain proper order
map_seasons <- all_levels[all_levels %in% map_seasons]

# Compute summaries for these seasons
map_trap <- data_traps |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% map_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, state, region) |>
  summarise(trap_success_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

map_burrow <- data_burrows |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% map_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, state, region) |>
  summarise(burrow_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

map_chew <- data_chewcards |>
  filter(season_year_adj %in% map_seasons) |>
  group_by(season_year_adj, state, region) |>
  summarise(chewcard_pct = round(mean(mice_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), .groups = "drop")

map_summary <- map_trap |>
  full_join(map_burrow, by = c("season_year_adj", "state", "region")) |>
  full_join(map_chew, by = c("season_year_adj", "state", "region")) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    max_activity = max(c_across(c(trap_success_pct, burrow_pct, chewcard_pct)), na.rm = TRUE),
    activity_level = case_when(
      is.infinite(max_activity) ~ "No data",
      max_activity >= 25 ~ "High",
      max_activity >= 5  ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE               ~ "Low"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-max_activity)

# Compute region centroids from all site coordinates
region_coords <- bind_rows(
  data_traps |> select(region, state, longitude, latitude),
  data_burrows |> select(region, state, longitude, latitude),
  data_chewcards |> select(region, state, longitude, latitude)
) |>
  group_by(region, state) |>
  summarise(
    longitude = mean(longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    latitude = mean(latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Join spatial coordinates with map summary
map_summary_spatial <- map_summary |>
  left_join(region_coords, by = c("state", "region")) |>
  # build a concise label: trap% / burrow% / chewcard%
  mutate(
    metric_label = paste0(
      ifelse(is.na(trap_success_pct), "", paste0("T:", trap_success_pct, "%")),
      ifelse(is.na(burrow_pct), "", paste0(" B:", burrow_pct, "%")),
      ifelse(is.na(chewcard_pct), "", paste0(" C:", chewcard_pct, "%"))
    ),
    metric_label = trimws(metric_label),
    # ensure proper season ordering for facets
    season_year_adj = factor(season_year_adj, levels = all_levels)
  )

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = aus_shp, fill = "white", colour = "grey70") +
  geom_point(
    data = map_summary_spatial,
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, colour = activity_level),
    size = 5
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = map_summary_spatial,
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude,
        label = paste0(str_to_title(region), "\n", metric_label)),
    size = 2.2, lineheight = 0.85, max.overlaps = 20,
    segment.colour = "grey60", segment.size = 0.3,
    box.padding = 0.4, point.padding = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Low" = "#b8e186", "Moderate" = "#fee08b", "High" = "#d73027", "No data" = "grey80"),
    name = "Activity level"
  ) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(113, 155), ylim = c(-40, -25), expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ season_year_adj, ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7)
  )

```
